component.name: DeckSave
component.summary: Backup and sync game saves across devices

description.p: DeckSave automatically detects your Steam games and backs up their save files. Sync saves between Steam Deck, Windows PC, and Linux via Syncthing.
Gamepad API controls (D-pad, A/B buttons, shoulder tab switching), auto-register as non-Steam game, Syncthing auto-install, and first-run setup wizard.
Initial release — MVP with Steam game detection, backup/restore, file watching, and Syncthing sync.
